x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Hardware Asset Workspace is the primary interface where Now Assist HAM AI insights are presented to asset managers. Without it, AI-generated lifecycle recommendations and refresh plans are produced but never surfaced where asset managers work.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function() { var gr = new GlideRecord("sys_store_app"); gr.addQuery("scope", "sn_ham_workspace"); gr.setLimit(1); gr.query(); if (gr.next()) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Hardware Asset Workspace is active", finding: "Hardware Asset Workspace is active. Now Assist HAM AI insights are surfaced in context for hardware asset managers." }; } var gr2 = new GlideRecord("sys_plugins"); gr2.addQuery("id", "sn_ham_workspace"); gr2.addQuery("active", true); gr2.setLimit(1); gr2.query(); if (gr2.next()) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Hardware Asset Workspace is active", finding: "Hardware Asset Workspace is active. Now Assist HAM AI lifecycle and refresh insights are available to asset managers." }; } return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "Hardware Asset Workspace not found or inactive", finding: "Hardware Asset Workspace is not active. Now Assist HAM AI insights are not accessible in a contextually relevant interface for hardware asset managers." }; })
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Activate the Hardware Asset Workspace via the ServiceNow Store or Plugin Manager. The workspace is required for Now Assist HAM AI insights to surface in context for hardware asset managers.
